info.name: Customer Churn Prediction API
info.description:
Postman collection for the FastAPI churn prediction service.

Start the server first:
  uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000

Then import this file into Postman: File → Import → Upload Files.

request.description: Liveness probe — returns 200 + model readiness status.
Returns the loaded model name and type. Use as a readiness check after deployment.
High-risk profile: short tenure, Fiber optic, month-to-month, Electronic check, no add-on services. Expect high churn probability.
Low-risk profile: long tenure, two-year contract, many services, bank transfer. Expect low churn probability.
Same medium-risk customer scored at threshold=0.35. Compare the 'churn' label vs the default threshold=0.5 call to see how the cutoff affects the decision.
Intentionally invalid — tenure is negative and most fields are missing. Expect HTTP 422 with a field-level error list from the custom Pydantic handler.

body.raw:
{
  "threshold": 0.5,
  "customers": [

request.description: Batch of 4 customers covering high-risk, low-risk, medium-risk, and edge-case profiles. Returns a 'predictions' array in the same order.
